{{Infobox concept
| name = The Tree
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Tree]] is related to the sacrifice in Ragnarus and has seemed restless for several years.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Enosh Travelers]] intend to destroy the [[Tree]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Tree]] is something that can be examined by a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
